name: kotoba-web-cljs
description: ClojureScript read-plane glue for the kotoba browser node (IPNS head resolution + CID-verified query orchestration). Emits ESM into ../cljs-out.

scripts.test:wallet:node: node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 22) { throw new Error('wallet CLJS gate requires Node 22+, got ' + process.versions.node); } console.log('node', process.versions.node)"
scripts.test:wallet:all: npm run test:wallet:node && npm run test:wallet && npm run test:wallet:edn && shadow-cljs compile web && npm run test:wallet:esm
